trends.trend_title: Indian Startup Funding and Venture Debt Trends
trends.summary: Indian startups raised $98 million in funding during the week ending early March 2024, with overall startup funding falling to $90 million as venture capital deal activity slowed. Stride Ventures secured backing from the Public Investment Fund (PIF), highlighting the growing traction of venture debt among Indian startups.

trends.summary: Indian startup Rozana secured $22.5 million in funding during the week of March 2 to March 7, 2024. This funding round was highlighted among the top deals in the Indian startup ecosystem, as reported by Business Outreach Magazine and Entrackr. The investment reflects growing investor interest in Indian startups during this period.

trends.trend_title: Raymond Realty Rs 3,000 Cr Kandivali JV
trends.summary: Raymond Realty has signed a joint venture to develop a housing project in Kandivali, Mumbai, with expected revenues of Rs 3,000 crore. This marks the company's seventh joint development project, highlighting its strategic expansion in the urban housing market.
evidence_snippets: [ET Industry] In an exciting new chapter for urban development, Raymond Realty has teamed up to launch a promising housing project in Kandivali, Mumbai, with anticipated revenues soaring to Rs 3,000 crore.
[The Hindu Business Line] Completes 75,000 sq ft SBI workspace project in Mumbai
[India Today Business]

trends.summary: On March 9, 2026, Universal Health Services, Inc. announced its acquisition of Talkspace, Inc., a leading virtual behavioral healthcare platform. This move aims to accelerate UHS's outpatient strategy by expanding access to virtual care services.

trends.trend_title: Cult.fit Expands Fitness and Product Offerings
trends.summary: Cult.fit is broadening its fitness portfolio by investing in affordable mass-market gyms like Cult Neo, premium Pilates studios, and a growing consumer products division. This strategic expansion positions the company to compete with boutique studios, independent gyms, and direct-to-consumer fitness brands.
evidence_snippets: [Mint Companies] The company is investing in mass-market centres like Cult Neo, premium Pilates studios, and a rapidly growing consumer products division as it aims to become an active lifestyle brand.
[Finextra] Internal documents reveal Lloyds Bank’s aim to reduce technology costs by 35% by selling customer data and automating governance checks.
[TechCrunch AI] City Detect, a company that helps local governments prevent urban decay, is in at least 17 cities so far, including Dallas and Miami.

trends.trend_title: Nscale Global $14.6B Valuation and IPO Plans
trends.summary: Nvidia-backed Nscale Global reached a $14.6 billion valuation in a recent funding round as it prepares for an initial public offering. The company has engaged Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan as IPO underwriters, with notable investors including former Meta executives Nick Clegg and Sheryl Sandberg.
evidence_snippets: [ET Tech] The funding ⁠round comes ahead of the AI ​group's preparations for an initial public ​offering, for which Nscale Global has hired Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan as underwriters, sources told Reuters earli

[Finextra] Kast, a global financial platform built on stablecoin rails founded by former Circle executive Raagulan Pathy, has raised $80 million in a Series A funding round co-led by QED Investors and Left Lane
[Finextra] Payment performance partner NjiaPay has closed a $2.1 million seed funding round led by European B2B SaaS investor Newion.

trends.summary: ABB announced a $75 million investment in India for 2026 to scale manufacturing and R&D across five locations. The investment will focus on critical infrastructure sectors such as renewable energy, metro rail, and data centers, aiming to enhance the company's capabilities in these strategic areas.
evidence_snippets: [Mint] Mojtaba Khamenei has amassed sprawling international investments, while economic hardship at home has sparked Iran's deadliest protests in decades.
[Mint Markets] United Spirits’s shares trade at about 48x FY27 estimated earnings, suggesting a large part of the optimism may have been priced in, for now.
[Finextra] Mastercard has taken aim at one of the biggest emerging issues in the agentic commerce goldrush, signing up big name partners for a new open, standards-based layer for trust.

trends.summary: ClearToken, an FCA-authorised digital financial market infrastructure provider, has partnered with Canton Network to deploy three Daml-based Digital Asset Platforms—CT Register, CT Pay, and CT Settle—directly on the Canton Network. This strategic collaboration aims to enhance digital asset management and settlement capabilities.

trends.summary: Hyundai launched the 2026 Verna in India with a starting price of Rs. 10.98 lakh. This new model aims to strengthen Hyundai's position in the competitive Indian sedan market. The launch was reported alongside other tech and automotive industry updates in early 2024.
